text:
[별지 제9호서식] <개정 2002.4.27>(앞쪽)
외국인의 부동산등기용등록증명서발급신청서

for Foreigner's Real Estate Registration

    부동산등기법 제41조의2 및 법인아닌사단·재단및외국인의부동산등기용등록번호부
여절차에관한규정 제15조의 규정에 의하여 부동산등기용등록증명서발급을 신청합니
다.
    I would kindly like to request for the issuance of a Registry Certificate for 
Foreigner's Real Estate Registration according to the provisions made in Article 
41-2 of Real Estate Registration Act and the provisions in Article 15 of 
Granting Procedures for Registry Number for Real Estate Registration of an 
Association or a Foundation.

  To : Chief, ○○Immigration(Branch) Office
  첨부서류 : 여권 또는 국적증서 사본 1부

 of Nationality
